title: Determine wool classing strategies
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Determine wool classing strategies demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Source information for input to classing strategies

pcs.text: Obtain information on previous year's clip preparation and sale results, including Wool Classer's specification, test results and appraisal and of non-measured characteristics
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain information on previous year's clip preparation and sale results, including Wool Classer's specification, test results and appraisal and of non-measured characteristics?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain information on previous year's clip preparation and sale results, including Wool Classer's specification, test results and appraisal and of non-measured characteristics.

pcs.text: Obtain information on growing and management history for the mobs over the last twelve months from the grower
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain information on growing and management history for the mobs over the last twelve months from the grower?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain information on growing and management history for the mobs over the last twelve months from the grower.

pcs.text: Identify current recommendations appropriate to the specific wool clip in the industry code of practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify current recommendations appropriate to the specific wool clip in the industry code of practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify current recommendations appropriate to the specific wool clip in the industry code of practice.

pcs.text: Obtain current specific exporter and buyer/broker requirements and limitations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain current specific exporter and buyer/broker requirements and limitations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain current specific exporter and buyer/broker requirements and limitations.

pcs.text: Identify marketing and selling methods and end uses for the wool and determine their implications on clip preparation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify marketing and selling methods and end uses for the wool and determine their implications on clip preparation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify marketing and selling methods and end uses for the wool and determine their implications on clip preparation.

pcs.text: Identify factors that will influence the classing process according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify factors that will influence the classing process according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify factors that will influence the classing process according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify the visual characteristics to be appraised using the relevant descriptors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the visual characteristics to be appraised using the relevant descriptors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the visual characteristics to be appraised using the relevant descriptors.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Source information for input to classing strategies

elements.title: Develop strategies for classing the clip

pcs.text: Identify fleece type and set up suitable fleece, skirting and oddment lines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify fleece type and set up suitable fleece, skirting and oddment lines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify fleece type and set up suitable fleece, skirting and oddment lines.

pcs.text: Select clip preparation methods to suit the fleece type and market requirements in line with quality standards and buyer/broker considerations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select clip preparation methods to suit the fleece type and market requirements in line with quality standards and buyer/broker considerations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select clip preparation methods to suit the fleece type and market requirements in line with quality standards and buyer/broker considerations.

pcs.text: Adopt operating procedures that eliminate contamination and address bale traceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adopt operating procedures that eliminate contamination and address bale traceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adopt operating procedures that eliminate contamination and address bale traceability.

pcs.text: Select shed layout and facilities that will permit efficient workflow and teamwork in line with workplace policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select shed layout and facilities that will permit efficient workflow and teamwork in line with workplace policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select shed layout and facilities that will permit efficient workflow and teamwork in line with workplace policies.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity hazards, assess risks and implement suitable control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity hazards, assess risks and implement suitable control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety (WHS) and biosecurity hazards, assess risks and implement suitable control measures.

pcs.text: Select requirements for labelling and placement of bins and containers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select requirements for labelling and placement of bins and containers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select requirements for labelling and placement of bins and containers.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop strategies for classing the clip

elements.title: Communicate classing strategy

pcs.text: Prepare the shed layout, equipment and facilities required and convey requirements for clip preparation to wool harvesting staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare the shed layout, equipment and facilities required and convey requirements for clip preparation to wool harvesting staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the shed layout, equipment and facilities required and convey requirements for clip preparation to wool harvesting staff.

pcs.text: Communicate clip preparation methods and classing procedures and confirm with the wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate clip preparation methods and classing procedures and confirm with the wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate clip preparation methods and classing procedures and confirm with the wool handlers.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse classed clips and review strategies based on lines made, appraisal of non-measured characteristics and test results.

pcs.text: Compare alternative clip preparation and classing strategies for profitability of the clip
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare alternative clip preparation and classing strategies for profitability of the clip?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare alternative clip preparation and classing strategies for profitability of the clip.

pcs.text: Appraise wool clip classing lines according to visual characteristics and record the appraisal of non-measured characteristics

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Appraise wool clip classing lines according to visual characteristics and record the appraisal of non-measured characteristics.
